name: freshdesk
description: Reads Freshdesk tickets, contacts, companies, agents, and groups through the Freshdesk REST API v2; additional Freshdesk operations are inventoried for gated CLI parity follow-up lanes.

risk.read: external Freshdesk API read of support tickets, contacts, companies, and team routing records
risk.write: Freshdesk create, update, admin, import/export, and delete operations are inventoried but blocked until named reverse-ETL actions provide schemas and approval gates
risk.approval: future Freshdesk writes require reverse ETL plan, preview, approval, execute; destructive/admin operations also require typed confirmation
